# Security Policy

## Supported Versions
This project is in early development. Security fixes are provided for the latest code on the default branch.

## Reporting a Vulnerability
Please do not open public issues for security vulnerabilities.

Report vulnerabilities through GitHub Security Advisories:
- https://github.com/mrSingh007/AI-CDK/security/advisories/new

If you cannot use advisories, contact https://ai-cdk.com
